scripts.dev:desktop: pnpm --filter @agenthub/desktop exec concurrently -k -n web,desktop "pnpm --filter @agenthub/web dev" "wait-on tcp:3000 && pnpm --filter @agenthub/desktop dev:app"
scripts.env:acceptance:db:up: docker compose -p agenthub_acceptance -f docker/docker-compose.acceptance.yml up -d postgres
scripts.env:runtime:up: docker compose -p agenthub_runtime -f docker/docker-compose.runtime.yml up -d redis worker
scripts.test:e2e:acceptance: ACCEPTANCE_E2E=1 npx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts --workers=1 --project=web-desktop tests/artifact.spec.ts tests/messaging.spec.ts tests/workspace.spec.ts tests/web/p0-main-flow.spec.ts tests/web/product-reality-gap-audit.spec.ts tests/web/workspace-local-desktop-uat.spec.ts tests/web/web-workspace-layout-uat.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:acceptance:runtime: ACCEPTANCE_E2E=1 RUNTIME_E2E=1 npx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts --workers=1 --project=web-desktop tests/web/role-chat-core.spec.ts tests/web/role-chat-uat-reply.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:acceptance:no-worker: ACCEPTANCE_E2E=1 RUNTIME_E2E_NOWORKER=1 npx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts --workers=1 --project=web-desktop tests/web/role-chat-no-worker.spec.ts
